description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian standing upright on a flat surface. He is dressed in a casual outfit consisting of a long-sleeve shirt layered with a vest, and straight-cut pants. The figure has short hair and a neatly groomed beard, with arms relaxed at his sides. His shoes are simple and practical, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The overall build is average, and the proportions are realistic, with clear articulation of limbs and facial features. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian stands upright with arms at his sides, wearing a long-sleeve shirt, vest, and pants. He has short hair, a beard, and practical shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full details of the shirt, vest, and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and leg, with the vest and pants visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, vest, and pants, with arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg, similar to the left side but mirrored.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt with vest and straight-cut pants
attribute_hairstyle: short hair with neatly groomed beard
